data.title: Microservices
data.description: YouTube's architecture uses a microservices model to improve scalability and manage services independently.
data.technical_spec: Deployed with Docker containers managed by Kubernetes. Services communicate over HTTP/REST and Apache Kafka.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Global load balancing ensures that traffic is efficiently distributed across servers.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with global CDN infrastructure and Anycast DNS.

data.title: Database Sharding
data.description: Databases are sharded to handle large volumes of data efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Uses Google Cloud Spanner and Bigtable for horizontal scaling.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: A global CDN is used to reduce latency for video streams worldwide.
data.technical_spec: Backed by Google's extensive data center network and Cloud CDN.

data.title: Failover Systems
data.description: High availability is maintained through automated failover systems.
data.technical_spec: Includes backup data centers and real-time data replication.
